name: tikat-codex
description: An AI coding assistant CLI that works with any OpenAI-compatible provider

scripts.release:patch: npm run build && npm version patch && git add -A && git push && git push --tags && npm install -g .
scripts.release:minor: npm run build && npm version minor && git add -A && git push && git push --tags && npm install -g .
scripts.release:major: npm run build && npm version major && git add -A && git push && git push --tags && npm install -g .
